# Pandaworks UI Registry

> Shared component registry for Pandahrms frontend projects. Built on shadcn/ui with Tailwind CSS v4, OKLCH color space, and Radix UI primitives.

## Installation

Install any component via the shadcn CLI:

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pandaworks-software-plt/pandaworks-ui/main/public/r/<component-name>.json
```

Components are installed to `src/components/ui/`. Import from `@/components/ui/<name>`.

## Tech Stack

- React 19, TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v4 (OKLCH color space)
- Radix UI primitives
- class-variance-authority for variants
- Lucide icons

## Component Catalog

For full API docs, props, and code examples, read the linked doc file.

### Layout

| Component | Description | Docs |
|-----------|-------------|------|
| AppShell | Data-driven app layout with collapsible sidebar, header, user menu | [app-shell.md](docs/app-shell.md) |
| PageHeader | Page title, description, and action buttons | [layout.md](docs/layout.md) |
| DetailPage | Resource detail/show page layout with sidebar | [detail-page.md](docs/detail-page.md) |
| Modal | Form modal with sticky header/footer, size variants | [modal.md](docs/modal.md) |
| Stepper | Multi-step progress (horizontal or vertical); descriptions only on current step | [layout.md](docs/layout.md) |
| Separator | Horizontal or vertical divider | [layout.md](docs/layout.md) |
| Breadcrumb | Navigation breadcrumb trail | [layout.md](docs/layout.md) |

### Forms

| Component | Description | Docs |
|-----------|-------------|------|
| Button | Variants, action presets, icon, tooltip, loading | [button.md](docs/button.md) |
| Input | Text input field | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Label | Accessible form label | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Textarea | Multi-line text input | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Checkbox | Checkbox with label support | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| RadioGroup | Radio button group | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Switch | Toggle switch | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Select | Static dropdown (< 10 items) | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| SelectPicker | Searchable dropdown, single/multi select | [select-picker.md](docs/select-picker.md) |
| DatePicker | Single date picker | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| DateRangePicker | Date range picker with presets | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Slider | Range slider | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| Form | react-hook-form integration with field context | [form.md](docs/form.md) |
| SearchInput | Debounced search input with clear button | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| SplitButton | Primary action + dropdown secondary actions | [split-button.md](docs/split-button.md) |
| AttachmentInput | File upload with dropzone/compact variants | [attachment-input.md](docs/attachment-input.md) |
| SelectableCard | Card-based single/multi selection | [forms.md](docs/forms.md) |
| FilterBar | FilterButton trigger + ActiveFilters chips | [filter-bar.md](docs/filter-bar.md) |

### Data Display

| Component | Description | Docs |
|-----------|-------------|------|
| Card | Container with header, content, footer | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| Table | Data table with header, body, footer | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| Badge | Status indicator (default, secondary, destructive, outline) | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| Avatar | User avatar with image and fallback | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| Calendar | Date calendar | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| Skeleton | Loading placeholder | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| Progress | Progress bar | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| CodeLabel | Inline monospace label with copy button | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| AnimatedNumber | Animated number display with easing | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |
| ExpandableText | Collapsible long text with show more/less | [data-display.md](docs/data-display.md) |

### Feedback

| Component | Description | Docs |
|-----------|-------------|------|
| Alert | Alert banner (default, destructive, info) | [feedback.md](docs/feedback.md) |
| AlertDialog | Modal confirmation dialog | [feedback.md](docs/feedback.md) |
| Sonner | Toast notifications | [feedback.md](docs/feedback.md) |
| LoadingPage | Full-screen loading state | [feedback.md](docs/feedback.md) |
| ConnectionBanner | Offline/connectivity warning banner | [feedback.md](docs/feedback.md) |
| ErrorFallback | Error boundary fallback (root/route variants) | [error-fallback.md](docs/error-fallback.md) |

### Overlay

| Component | Description | Docs |
|-----------|-------------|------|
| Dialog | Modal dialog with header, content, footer | [overlay.md](docs/overlay.md) |
| Sheet | Slide-out panel (top, right, bottom, left) | [overlay.md](docs/overlay.md) |
| DropdownMenu | Context/action menu | [overlay.md](docs/overlay.md) |
| Tooltip | Hover tooltip | [overlay.md](docs/overlay.md) |
| Popover | Click-triggered popover | [overlay.md](docs/overlay.md) |
| Command | Command palette with search | [overlay.md](docs/overlay.md) |

### Navigation

| Component | Description | Docs |
|-----------|-------------|------|
| Tabs | Tab panels (pill and line variants) | [navigation.md](docs/navigation.md) |
| Accordion | Collapsible sections | [navigation.md](docs/navigation.md) |
| Collapsible | Single collapsible section | [navigation.md](docs/navigation.md) |
| Pagination | Page navigation | [navigation.md](docs/navigation.md) |
| ScrollArea | Custom scrollbar container | [navigation.md](docs/navigation.md) |
| Toggle | Single toggle button | [navigation.md](docs/navigation.md) |
| ToggleGroup | Group of toggle buttons | [navigation.md](docs/navigation.md) |

## Decision Guide: Which Component to Use

| Scenario | Component |
|----------|-----------|
| App-wide layout with sidebar nav | AppShell |
| Page title + description + actions | PageHeader |
| Detail/show page for a resource | DetailPage |
| Form modal with sticky header/footer | Modal |
| Short static dropdown (< 10 items) | Select |
| Searchable dropdown, long lists | SelectPicker |
| Multiple selection from a list | SelectPicker (mode="multiple") |
| Pick a single date | DatePicker |
| Pick a date range | DateRangePicker |
| File upload with drag & drop | AttachmentInput (variant="dropzone") |
| Inline file upload button | AttachmentInput (variant="compact") |
| Card-based single/multi selection | SelectableCard |
| Standard action (create/edit/delete) | Button (action prop) |
| Primary + secondary actions | SplitButton |
| Search/filter input with debounce | SearchInput |
| Table filtering with chips | FilterButton + ActiveFilters |
| Multi-step wizard progress | Stepper |
| Animated score/metric display | AnimatedNumber |
| Collapsible long text | ExpandableText |
| Confirmation before destructive action | AlertDialog |
| Form modal / side panel | Dialog or Sheet |
| Inline monospace ID with copy | CodeLabel |
| Toast notifications | Sonner (toast) |
| Status indicator | Badge |
| Loading placeholder | Skeleton |
| Full-screen loading state | LoadingPage |
| Offline/connectivity warning | ConnectionBanner |
| Error boundary fallback | ErrorFallback |

## Styling Conventions

- Always support dark mode via `dark:` Tailwind variants
- Use CSS variables for theme colors (defined in globals.css)
- Color space: OKLCH
- Base color: zinc
- Icons: Lucide React (`lucide-react`)
- Font: Open Sans (set in globals.css)

## Changelog

Machine-readable changelog for AI agents consuming this registry.
When syncing components to downstream projects, use this section to determine what changed and what actions are required.

Each entry contains:
- **component**: the registry component name
- **change**: what changed (added | modified | removed | renamed)
- **action**: what consuming projects must do
- **breaking**: whether this is a breaking change
- **details**: concise description of the change

---

### 2026-04-23

#### tooltip

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: `TooltipContent` now wraps Radix `Portal` so the popper layer mounts on `document.body`, avoiding clipping and stacking issues inside scrollable regions or transformed layout (same pattern as `PopoverContent`).
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/tooltip --overwrite --yes` (or your registry URL) to pick up the change
  - No API changes; custom `className` / props on `TooltipContent` behave as before

#### stepper

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: Smaller circles (`size-7`) and labels; completed steps and finished track segments use emerald (`emerald-600` / `emerald-500` in dark). Current step uses primary border plus a light ring. New optional `orientation` prop: `"vertical"` renders a top-down list with a left spine. Horizontal layout keeps leading/trailing `flex-1` segments for even spacing. Step `description` and optional `tooltip` popover render only when that step is the current index. Track segments layer a muted base with an emerald fill that animates with `scale-x` / `scale-y` (~500ms, `ease-out`); `prefers-reduced-motion` removes the transition.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/stepper --overwrite --yes` (or your registry URL) to pick up visuals and `orientation`
  - Override `className` if you need larger step markers than the new defaults

#### code-label

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: `CodeLabel` now uses a subtler filled background (no outline border). The copy button is hidden by default and reveals with width/opacity expansion on hover/focus, appears on touch/press for mobile, and stays visible briefly after touch release and copy success feedback.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/code-label --overwrite --yes` (or your registry URL) to get the updated behavior and styling
  - No API changes; existing `value`, `size`, and `className` usage stays the same

#### sheet

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: Sheet panels are inset from the viewport (floating card), use rounded corners (`rounded-2xl`), `shadow-xl`, a light ring, and `overflow-y-auto` with overscroll containment. No enter/exit animation classes on overlay or content (Radix still handles mount/unmount timing).
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/sheet --overwrite --yes` (or your registry URL) to pick up styles
  - If you relied on edge-to-edge sheets, override `className` on `SheetContent` to restore full-bleed layout

#### button

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: `brand`, `destructive`, `outline`, and `secondary` variants now use `shadow-xs` with `hover:shadow-sm` instead of bespoke multi-layer inset/box shadows. Visual weight is slightly flatter and closer to stock shadcn elevation.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/button --overwrite --yes` (or your registry URL) if you want the updated styling
  - No prop or API changes

#### dialog

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: `DialogOverlay` uses `bg-black/50` with `backdrop-blur-[1px]`. `DialogContent` adds `border-border` and uses `shadow-md` instead of `shadow-lg`.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/dialog --overwrite --yes` (or your registry URL)

#### command

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: Root `Command` panel adds `border border-border/70` and `shadow-md`. `CommandGroup` heading styles use Tailwind v4 `**:[[cmdk-group-heading]]:…` descendant variants instead of `[&_[cmdk-group-heading]]:…`.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/command --overwrite --yes` (or your registry URL)
  - If you overrode group heading styles via global CSS on `[cmdk-group-heading]`, re-check specificity against the new utilities

#### dropdown-menu

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: Content/sub-content use `border-border`, `min-w-32`, and `shadow-md` on sub-content. Items use `data-disabled:` variant selectors instead of `data-[disabled]:`. `max-h` uses `max-h-(--radix-dropdown-menu-content-available-height)`.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/dropdown-menu --overwrite --yes` (or your registry URL)

#### select

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: `SelectTrigger` uses `shadow-xs` / `focus:shadow-sm` and `data-placeholder:text-muted-foreground`. `SelectContent` uses `min-w-32`, `shadow-sm`, and `data-disabled:` on items. Popper viewport uses `h-(--radix-select-trigger-height)` and `min-w-(--radix-select-trigger-width)`.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/select --overwrite --yes` (or your registry URL)

#### popover

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: `PopoverContent` adds explicit `border-border` alongside existing border and shadow utilities.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/popover --overwrite --yes` (or your registry URL)

#### app-shell

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: `AppShell` now uses the inset sidebar variant by default, and the inset main surface uses a larger rounded frame (`rounded-3xl`) with existing border/shadow layering for a blended dashboard shell look.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/app-shell --overwrite --yes` (or your registry URL) to pick up the updated shell framing
  - No API changes; existing `AppShellProps` usage remains compatible

#### registry batch (alert-dialog, app-shell, attachment-input, card, input, modal, selectable-card, split-button, table, textarea)

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: Minor className alignment for Tailwind v4 patterns and visual consistency (e.g. `border-border`, shadow tokens, `data-disabled` where Radix exposes the attribute, small layout tokens). No intentional public API changes.
- action:
  - Re-install the specific components you use from the registry with `--overwrite` if you want pixel-identical styling to the latest build

#### demo (pandawork-ui repo)

- change: added
- breaking: no
- details: New in-repo SaaS-style demo route at `/saas-showcase` for exercising registry components in a cohesive app shell. Added `pnpm test:ui-audit` (Playwright) and `artifacts/playwright-ui-audit/` baseline captures. Demo shell now uses a darker radial page backdrop with layered depth, and global demo radius token is increased (`--radius: 0.75rem`) for rounder default corners.
- action:
  - No action for registry-only consumers. Clone/update the repo to run the demo or audit script locally.

### 2026-04-08

#### detail-page

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: Added `DetailPageSidebarSection` sub-component. A sidebar section with header row (label + optional action slot) and free-form children. Inspired by GitHub issue detail sidebar pattern.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/detail-page --overwrite --yes` to update
  - No code changes required. Existing `DetailPageMetaItem` usage is unaffected.
  - New `DetailPageSidebarSection` is available for use alongside or instead of `DetailPageMetaItem`

#### registry (repo rename)

- change: renamed
- breaking: yes
- details: Repository renamed from `pandahrms-ui-registry` to `pandaworks-ui`. Registry URL changed. Registry key changed from `@pandahrms` to `@pandaworks`.
- action:
  - Update `components.json` registry URL from `pandahrms-ui-registry` to `pandaworks-ui`
  - Update registry key from `@pandahrms` to `@pandaworks` in `components.json`
  - Update all `npx shadcn add` commands to use new URL

#### button

- change: modified
- breaking: yes
- details: `default` variant is now standard shadcn/ui style (plain). Previous `default` (blue with inset shadows) moved to new `brand` variant.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/button --overwrite --yes` to update the component
  - Search codebase for `variant="default"` on `<Button>` -- if the intent was the blue styled button, change to `variant="brand"`
  - Buttons with no explicit `variant` prop now render as the plain default -- verify this is acceptable or add `variant="brand"` where the blue button was expected
  - Action presets `create` and `save` already updated to use `brand` -- no change needed if using `action="create"` or `action="save"`

---

### 2026-04-03

#### sonner

- change: modified
- breaking: yes
- details: Decoupled from `next-themes`. No longer imports or depends on ThemeProvider. Improved type safety and accessibility.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/sonner --overwrite --yes`
  - If your project was relying on sonner auto-detecting theme from `next-themes`, you may need to pass the `theme` prop explicitly

#### all components (24 affected)

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: Added `data-slot` attributes for DOM identification. Standardized double quotes. No API changes.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/<component> --overwrite --yes` for each component to pick up the changes
  - No code changes required in consuming projects

#### barrel exports (19 components)

- change: added
- breaking: no
- details: Added `index.ts` barrel exports for avatar, badge, button, calendar, card, checkbox, collapsible, command, dialog, dropdown-menu, input, label, popover, separator, sheet, sidebar, toggle, tooltip, app-shell-types.
- action:
  - No action required. Consuming projects can optionally update imports to use barrel exports

#### useCopyToClipboard

- change: added
- breaking: no
- details: New hook in `src/hooks/use-copy-to-clipboard.ts`. Copies text to clipboard with a reset timer.
- action:
  - Available for use in consuming projects. No action required unless you want to use it.

---

### 2026-03-31

#### button

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: Added `action` prop with 12 presets (create, edit, save, delete, cancel, view, export, import, archive, duplicate, print, link). Added `icon`, `tooltip`, and `loading` props. Auto-resolves icon, variant, label, and tooltip from action presets.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/button --overwrite --yes`
  - Replace all `<CreateButton>`, `<EditButton>`, `<SaveButton>`, etc. with `<Button action="create">`, `<Button action="edit">`, `<Button action="save">`, etc.
  - Replace `<ConfirmableActionButton>` with `<AlertDialog>` wrapping `<Button action="delete">`
  - Remove all imports from `@/components/ui/action-button/*`

#### action-button

- change: removed
- breaking: yes
- details: Entire component removed (15 files). All functionality consolidated into Button `action` prop.
- action:
  - Delete `@/components/ui/action-button/` directory from consuming projects
  - Remove `action-button` from `components.json` if present
  - See button entry above for migration steps

#### alert-dialog

- change: modified
- breaking: no
- details: Internal refactor -- AlertDialog action/cancel buttons now use `<Button>` via `asChild` instead of applying `buttonVariants` classes directly.
- action:
  - Run `npx shadcn@latest add @pandaworks/alert-dialog --overwrite --yes`
  - No code changes required in consuming projects
